text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, you were so close! You nearly had it there!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Are you hungry right now?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I bet you are! You probably couldn't do your best
because your tummy's empty!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to bake a cake once we get back, so
let's eat it together!
